meta_description: Precision CNC Swiss machining (turning) services offered at Junying is capable of producing best quality Swiss CNC machined parts and turned parts based on your exact specifications.

sections.heading: Your Swiss Machining Company & Custom Swiss Machining Provider
sections.text: Your Swiss Machining Company & Custom Swiss Machining Provider We are a leading Swiss machining company and custom Swiss machining provider, specializing in precision components for medical, aerospace, electronics, and automation industries. Our Swiss CNC machining services and precision Swiss machining capabilities ensure tight tolerances, complex geometries, and consistent quality for small precision components. We support prototype, low-volume, and high-volume production requirements with reliable quality and fast turnaround. What Is Swiss Machining? Swiss machining, also known as Swiss turning, Swiss screw machining, or Swiss CNC turning, is a specialized process designed for manufactur...
